testcase.name: test_materials_have_usd_prices

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 6 materials, got 7 assert 7 == 6 + where 7 = len([{'category': 'Parda', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788011+00:00', 'description': "Yorug'lik o'tkazmaydigan parda", 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a0', ...}, {'category': 'Parda', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788023+00:00', 'description': 'Shaffof tull parda', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a1', ...}, {'category': 'Jalyuzi', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788026+00:00', 'description': 'Zamonaviy roller jalyuzi', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a2', ...}, {'category': 'Jalyuzi', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788035+00:00', 'description': 'Alyuminiy gorizontal jalyuzi', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a3', ...}, {'category': 'Jalyuzi', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788038+00:00', 'description': 'Ofis uchun vertikal jalyuzi', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a4', ...}, {'category': 'Parda', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788039+00:00', 'description': 'Premium rimskaya parda', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a5', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: tests/test_usd_verification.py:55: in test_materials_have_usd_prices assert len(materials) == 6, f"Expected 6 materials, got {len(materials)}" E AssertionError: Expected 6 materials, got 7 E assert 7 == 6 E + where 7 = len([{'category': 'Parda', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788011+00:00', 'description': "Yorug'lik o'tkazmaydigan parda", 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a0', ...}, {'category': 'Parda', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788023+00:00', 'description': 'Shaffof tull parda', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a1', ...}, {'category': 'Jalyuzi', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788026+00:00', 'description': 'Zamonaviy roller jalyuzi', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a2', ...}, {'category': 'Jalyuzi', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788035+00:00', 'description': 'Alyuminiy gorizontal jalyuzi', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a3', ...}, {'category': 'Jalyuzi', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788038+00:00', 'description': 'Ofis uchun vertikal jalyuzi', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a4', ...}, {'category': 'Parda', 'created_at': '2026-03-30T08:44:10.788039+00:00', 'description': 'Premium rimskaya parda', 'id': '69ca37da2d4df4c22ab1f6a5', ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_dealer_credit_limit_is_5000_usd
testcase.failure: tests/test_usd_verification.py:77: in test_dealer_credit_limit_is_5000_usd assert user["debt"] == 0, f"Expected debt $0, got ${user['debt']}" E AssertionError: Expected debt $0, got $112.0 E assert 112.0 == 0
